plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Roamie can use your location in the background to check and save your similarity score about every 3 minutes. You can also choose areas manually from the map.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Roamie uses your current location only when you choose device-location features. You can also choose areas manually from the map.

plugins.userTrackingPermission: Roamie would like permission to use your user ID, home area, location history, and travel mood for partner mobility insights, including sharing with data brokers.
